title: Sparse arrays should not be created with extra commas
description: Sparse arrays should not be created with extra commasAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellsuspiciousWhy is this an issue?More InfoA sparse array is an array in which the elements do not occupy a contiguous range of indices. In other words, there are gaps (or "holes") between the elements in the array, where some indices have no corresponding value assigned to them.Including an extra comma in an array literal signifies an empty slot in the array, thus creating a sparse array. An empty slot is not the same as a slot filled with theundefinedvalue.
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

checks.message: Avoid sparse arrays: starting with empty slot creates array holes
Avoid sparse arrays: consecutive commas create array holes
Avoid sparse arrays: multiple trailing commas create array holes
